MAESTRO-STRIKE_MAESTRO.title: Strike
MAESTRO-DEFEND_MAESTRO.title: Defend
MAESTRO-SUSTAIN.title: Sustain
MAESTRO-CONCERT_A.title: Concert A
MAESTRO-MISSED_ENTRANCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Shuffle a [gold]Shame[/gold] into your draw pile.
MAESTRO-MISSED_ENTRANCE.title: Missed Entrance
MAESTRO-PAGE_FLIP.description: Draw {FirstDraw:diff()} {FirstDraw:plural:card|cards}. At the start of your next turn, draw {SecondDraw:diff()} {SecondDraw:plural:card|cards}.
MAESTRO-PAGE_FLIP.title: Page Flip
MAESTRO-FINALE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills an enemy, end your turn.
MAESTRO-FINALE.title: Finale
MAESTRO-BOWING_TECHNIQUE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} Dexterity this turn.
MAESTRO-BOWING_TECHNIQUE.title: Bowing Technique
MAESTRO-OFFBEAT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If this is the second card played this turn, this costs 1 less.
MAESTRO-OFFBEAT.title: Offbeat
MAESTRO-SUBITO_FORTE.title: Subito Forte
MAESTRO-DELEGATE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add a [gold]Performer[/gold] to your hand.
MAESTRO-DELEGATE.title: Delegate
MAESTRO-STACCATO.title: Staccato
MAESTRO-COMMON_TIME.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat} times.
MAESTRO-COMMON_TIME.title: Common Time
MAESTRO-HESITATION.title: Hesitation
MAESTRO-LONG_TONES.description: Gain {Resonance:diff()} [gold]Resonance[/gold]. This card can be upgraded an infinite number of times.
MAESTRO-LONG_TONES.title: Long Tones
MAESTRO-FERMATA.title: Fermata
MAESTRO-SECTIONAL.description: Add {Amount} of the same [gold]Performer[/gold] to your hand.
MAESTRO-SECTIONAL.title: Sectional
MAESTRO-JAM_SESSION.description: At the start of every turn, add 1 [gold]Performer[/gold] to your hand.
MAESTRO-JAM_SESSION.title: Jam Session
MAESTRO-THIRD_MOVEMENT.description: Deal {Damage} damage. If this is the third card played this turn, this costs 1 less.
MAESTRO-THIRD_MOVEMENT.title: Third Movement
MAESTRO-PRACTICE_MAKES_PERFECT.descripti: Choose a card in your hand. Play it X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
MAESTRO-PRACTICE_MAKES_PERFECT.title: Practice Makes Perfect
MAESTRO-ACCELERANDO.description: Lose {DexterityPower} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the start of your turn, draw {AccelerandoPower:diff()} additional card.
MAESTRO-ACCELERANDO.title: Accelerando
MAESTRO-FORTISSIMO.description: Apply {VulnerablePower} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on all enemies. Apply {VulnerablePower} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] on yourself.
MAESTRO-FORTISSIMO.title: Fortissimo
MAESTRO-SECTION_LEADER.description: Whenever you add a [gold]Performer[/gold] to your hand, upgrade it.
MAESTRO-SECTION_LEADER.title: Section Leader
MAESTRO-CUTOFF.description: Lose all your [gold]Resonance[/gold]. Deal {IfUpgraded: 3:2}x the amount lost to an enemy.
MAESTRO-CUTOFF.title: Cutoff
MAESTRO-OCTAVE.description: Gain {Resonance} [gold]Resonance[/gold]. Can only be played if this is the 8th card played this turn.
MAESTRO-OCTAVE.title: Octave
MAESTRO-PIANISSIMO.description: Gain {IntangiblePower} [gold]Intangible[/gold]. You can't get [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for {Turns} turns.
MAESTRO-PIANISSIMO.title: Pianissimo
MAESTRO-PERFORMER1.title: Violinist
MAESTRO-PERFORMER2.title: Percussionist
MAESTRO-PERFORMER3.title: Trumpeter
MAESTRO-PERFORMER4.title: Flautist
MAESTRO-PERFORMER5.title: Bassist
